title: Viridis Core
description: The Core mod for the Wathe Viridis modpack
body:
## 🟢Viridis Core🟢
The Core mod for the [Wathe Viridis modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/watheviridis):

this is a mod that will add everything needed for the [Wathe Viridis modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/watheviridis)
right now it sadly only adds plushs (for credits in the map and because i thought they were cool)

I hope to get to make more maps for the [modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/watheviridis) and also add new blocks to make them look much better

![Plushies 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99be17d0d4fdf1102a370fc5b2a5da1e430af842.png)
![Plushies 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/341469e2d1c2eba8798ad86ea5c5c33918bf86b0.png)
Pictures were made with [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)
